text.title: Lessons Learned Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Lessons Learned end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: open-observation-log
step.action: Create observation log at project start; appoint observer per workstream.

step.name: capture-in-flight
step.action: Log signals daily / per-incident; do NOT batch.
step.decision-gate: If log empty at retro, treat as missing data.

step.name: synthesize-themes
step.action: Group observations into themes; identify recurring patterns.
step.decision-gate: If theme appears in two prior projects, mark as recurrence.

step.name: draft-action-items
step.action: Per theme: action with owner, due, acceptance.
step.decision-gate: If theme is recurrence, action MUST be SOP/methodology update.

step.name: publish-and-track
step.action: Validate; publish cross-team within 14d; track action closure.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix before publish.
